name: Warface – Yakuza Pack
description: This pack offers primary weapons for all classes and a pistol of the elegant “Yakuza” series. You will also receive 1000 Kredits under the patronage of your new allies. Unleash inner demons and let cherry blossoms cover the bodies in your wake!
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel/AMD Dual-Core 2.0 GHz
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce 8600 GT 256MB / AMD ATI Radeon X1950 256MB
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX Compatible Sound Card with latest drivers
comment1: Negative recommendation just because there is the yakuza katana in game what is not part of this DLC! This is so stupid....
comment2:
Y E S !
The skins are really nice, the LMG is useful in PvE, the other weapons are all around good, the sniper rifle is op, but that shotgun tho... It's so good and fun to use.

If you want some good DLC I recommend it. Only shame is it doesn't include the Katana, HCAR or Remington sniper rifle.
comment3: Doesn't come with a katana really?
